description_long: This is a yellow JCB backhoe excavator featuring a robust steel frame and a fully enclosed operator cab with large, dark-tinted windows for visibility and protection. The vehicle is equipped with two large wheels at the rear and two smaller wheels at the front, providing stability and maneuverability on urban construction sites. At the front, a wide, heavy-duty loader bucket is mounted on articulated arms, suitable for scooping and moving materials. The rear of the machine features a two-piece articulated boom with a standard digging bucket, designed for excavation and trenching tasks. The exterior shows signs of use, with some dirt and wear visible on the bucket and tires, indicating it is a working machine. Prominent JCB branding is visible on the sides and rear boom, signifying the manufacturer.
description: A yellow JCB backhoe excavator with a fully enclosed cab, front loader bucket, rear digging arm, and visible signs of use. It features four wheels and prominent JCB branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide loader bucket, large front wheels, and the cab's windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the articulated loader arm, rear digging boom, and JCB branding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two-piece boom, digging bucket, and the back of the cab.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the loader arm, rear boom, and additional JCB branding.
